name: cabin-hunters
summary: A single-room hunter's cabin: hearth, bedroll, stretched hides, traps on pegs. Practical, temporary, alone.

primary_palette.note: central living point — cook and warmth in one
trapper focus — the table is the room's purpose

story_prompts: occupied, hunter gone for the day — kettle still warm
abandoned mid-winter — everything frozen in place
recent struggle — overturned stool, missing knife, blood on the door jamb
well-kept summer base, rotated through by a small clan of trappers
anti_patterns: single room — do not split into multiple partitions
wall-hung hides and traps, not floor-placed
no formal furniture: no proper tables, no chairs, no chests with locks
